name: @vystartas/openclaw-memory-plugin
description: Local-first OpenClaw memory plugin with file-backed core memory and SQLite/FTS5 long-term recall

scripts.plugin:allow: openclaw config set plugins.allow[] memory-index-local && openclaw config set plugins.entries.memory-index-local.enabled true
scripts.plugin:dev-sync: mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/extensions/memory-index-local && cp openclaw.plugin.json ~/.openclaw/extensions/memory-index-local/openclaw.plugin.json && cp package.json ~/.openclaw/extensions/memory-index-local/package.json && cp package-lock.json ~/.openclaw/extensions/memory-index-local/package-lock.json && rm -rf ~/.openclaw/extensions/memory-index-local/dist && cp -R dist ~/.openclaw/extensions/memory-index-local/dist && npm ci --prefix ~/.openclaw/extensions/memory-index-local --ignore-scripts
scripts.plugin:reinstall: npm run plugin:clean && npm run plugin:install
scripts.plugin:rebuild: npm run build && npm run plugin:dev-sync
scripts.release:all: npm run release:prepare && npm run release:pack
